creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: Is it possible that you updated world but failed to update kernel?  Or that you updated both, but did not reboot before performing this experiment?  I'm going to close this bug on account of age.  But if you can still reproduce this problem, please reopen it.  Ensure that your world and kernel are matched when you do, and let us know the last OS version where the command worked.
